name: Tempeh Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup red bell pepper, sliced into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the olive oil, tamari, cider vinegar, and garlic in a bowl.
2. Add the cubed tempeh to the mixture and marinate for at least 1 hour.
3. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add half the tamari and cook until the tempeh is crispy and brown on the outside.
4. Cook the spiral pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
5. Toss the cooked pasta with the remaining ingredients, including the marinated tempeh.
6. Whisk together the dressing ingredients in a separate bowl and chill.
7. Add the chilled dressing to the tempeh and vegetable mix.
8. Toss everything together and serve.
